untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) detection of >2.5 standard deviations from 20-period mean — price_pos_20 uses Bollinger-style 2-period normalization, not explicit standard deviation calculation; (2) 'contrarian sentiment indicator' and sentiment percentile extreme are not available in allowed indicators; (3) confirmation of reversal intent on first pullback candle requires multi-bar pattern logic not expressible in 3-field conditions
translation_notes: Approximated mean-reversion via price_pos_20 extremes (edges of normalized range). Used RSI extremes (>75 for bullish overextension, <25 for bearish) as proxy for sentiment/overconfidence extremes. Vol_ratio_20 captures volume spike requirement. Entry logic requires ALL three conditions (AND). Exit uses RSI mean-reversion crossing 50-level. Confirmation candle requirement and explicit sentiment percentile cannot be translated.
